titlestmt.author: compiled by Carol King, Nancy Lyon, and staff of Manuscripts and Archives

conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual
conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday January 22, 2020 at 11:18
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.unittitle: Ethiopia collection
did.abstract: The collection consists of correspondence, journals, printed material, ephemera, and photographs relating to the history of Ethiopia and the current political and social conditions.

langmaterial.language: The material is in English and Amharic.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Transferred from the African Collection Curator.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Ethiopia Collection (MS 1516). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: Associated Materials
relatedmaterial.p: African Collection, MS 605; Pamphlet Collection, MS 1351; African Postcard Collection, MS 1575. Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The material in the original accession is arranged chronologically. Additions to the collection may vary in arrangement.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of correspondence, journals, printed material, ephemera, and photographs relating to the history of Ethiopia and the current political and social conditions.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Original accession
Italo-Abyssinian dispute: books; journals; letters; photographs
Ethiopian liberation and relief: journals; newsletters; printed material
General information pamphlets; brochures; booklets
Falasha Jews: newspaper clippings; printed material
Oromo liberation: journals; newsletters; printed material
Tigray liberation: journals; newsletters; printed material
Political organizations: printed material
Ministry of Information Press Department: printed material
Government documents: journals; reports
Massawa and Asmara: photograph album
"Photographs of Ethiopia 1958-1982 by Shemelis Desta": exhibition in the West Midlands
"Events in Dar es Salaam": photograph album by E. Gladden
"Tour to Gibraltar and Tangier": photograph album by E. Gladden
Photographs. See also: Kenya Collection, Manuscript Group Number 1523
Additional Material
Additional printed materials and photographs
Additional Material
Additional printed materials
Additional Material
"Forward" [newsletter of the World Wide Federation of Ethiopian Students]
REST Bulletin [Relief Society of Tigray, Ethiopian Human Rights Council report]
"Storm: Somali, Tigray & Oromo Resistance Monitor" [newsletter]
"Struggle" [journal of the Worldwide Federation of Ethiopian Students]
"Tigray" [newsletter of The Union of Tigreans in North America]
Tigray People's Liberation Front [news release]
Miscellaneous printed materials [human rights, art, archeology]
Photograph album [Italian, over 350 photographs of people, animals, and scenery in Ethiopia; a few Suez Canal and military shots]
Additional Material
Collector cards representing Ethiopian flags, coins, medals, monuments, and individuals, Rastafarian badge
La Lune, editorial cartoon, "Theodoros, Roi d'Abyssinie, le Lion d'Abyssinie et le Lion Britannique"
Relief Society of Tigray (REST) UK Support Committee, newsletter, press release, locust update, appeal letter
American-African Affairs, vol. 10, no. 6
Additional Material
Publications
Berhanena Selam (2)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The leading Ethiopian newspaper of the 1920s and 1930s, possibly commemorative issues for the coronation of Haile Selassie. The text is in Amharic.

did.unittitle: Hurggie Dima : The struggle in Tokkumma Oromo Organization in N. America (TOONA)
Oroma Speaks : A publication of the Oromo Liberation Front
Relief Society of Tigray: Annual Report
Seventh Report on the Drought and Overall Food Supply in Ethiopia
Waldhaanss o: Journal of the Union of Oromo Students in North America
Maps
Felt maps (3) of Ethiopia

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The back of each map reads "From Tiringo Tulu to Zerihun H/G." A brass cross adorns the front of each map.

did.unittitle: Photographs
Color photographs (9) of historic Coptic Christian churches and sites in Ethiopia, including among others, Lalibela
Additional material
Printed material
Marshall Graziani documents from shortly after conquest of Ethiopia
Propaganda art piece in relief of airplane dropping sewing machine by parachute to native
Posters
